hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
total_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    total_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
    total_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(total_cost<=11100)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
accommodation_position=''
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_position=activity_position(activity)
result=(poi_distance(target_city(plan), 'Guanlan Ocean World', accommodation_position)<=12.71553746586945)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 3 people traveling from Shanghai to Shenzhen for 4 days. The trip must meet either of the following conditions: 1. Total travel budget is 11100.0. 2. Accommodation is within 12.72 km of Guanlan Ocean World.
